items.summary: Update all text colours in the footer section (Footer.tsx) to a readable, high-contrast colour suitable for the dark background — including brand info, quick navigation links, menu category links, contact details, and newsletter text. Ensure all text meets readable contrast standards.
Update the colour of the hamburger menu icon (three-line icon) in the Navbar (Navbar.tsx) to a suitable, high-contrast colour so it is clearly visible against the navbar background on mobile.

Update the filter tab colours in the MenuTabs component (MenuTabs.tsx) to a suitable, readable colour — including active and inactive tab states — so the filter labels are clearly visible against the tab bar background.
